content.title: Ethan's Morning Routine â€” Weather Station Start

steps.activity: Check the weather chart (today's forecast card)
Say good morning to teacher (use YOUR words)
Choose morning work from choice board
steps.icon_note: Two cards with question mark icon

first_then.first: Check weather chart and say good morning

content.notes: The weather chart check gives Ethan a reason to use spontaneous speech every morning â€” he can report what he sees. Place the spin break AFTER the greeting step as a natural reinforcer. Keep the number 7 incorporated (count spins, 7 steps total) since it's calming and motivating for him. Laminate this schedule and velcro to desk. Ethan moves a tornado magnet down each step as he completes it.
